---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Get In Touch

If you're interested in collaborating or want to discuss data analytics opportunities, feel free to reach out.

- **Email**: {{< fa envelope >}} sample@example.com
- **LinkedIn**: {{< fa brands linkedin >}} [linkedin.com/in/sample](https://linkedin.com)
- **GitHub**: {{< fa brands github >}} [github.com/sample](https://github.com)

## References

| Name | Role | Contact |
|------|------|---------|
| Jane Doe | Senior Data Scientist | jane.doe@example.com |
| John Smith | Tech Lead | john.smith@example.com |

::: {.callout-important}
Please reach out to me directly if you need formal letters of recommendation.
:::
